finding_1_schema_still_not_exposed.postgrest_hint: Only the following schemas are exposed: public, graphql_public
finding_1_schema_still_not_exposed.conclusion: The exposed-schemas change has NOT taken effect on the project these credentials point at.

finding_2_wrong_project_isolation_risk.conclusion: This Supabase project hosts the TSM production database (dozens of public.tsm_* tables and RPCs). It is NOT an isolated Founder BTC Alpha project.
finding_2_wrong_project_isolation_risk.dispatch_conflict: Hard rule 1 requires full isolation from TSM and zero reference to public.tsm_* objects. Writing founder_alpha capture data into the TSM production database co-locates this research system with production trading infrastructure.
finding_2_wrong_project_isolation_risk.most_likely_explanation: The CTO exposed founder_alpha on the correct, separate project, but the SUPABASE_URL/SERVICE_ROLE_KEY supplied point at the TSM project. That reconciles both findings.

credential_scope_concern.detail: The supplied service_role key bypasses RLS across this ENTIRE project, including TSM production tables and destructive RPCs (rpc/delete_user_data, rpc/insert_canonical_trade_record, rpc/tsm_record_canonical_decision).
credential_scope_concern.aggravating_factor: This key was pasted into a chat transcript.
credential_scope_concern.recommendation: Rotate immediately, and scope Phase 0 to a dedicated project.

actions_taken.writes_performed: NONE. Only failed SELECT probes and one OpenAPI root GET. No data was written to this project.
